evals.name: audit config latest features
evals.prompt: A user says: evolve my Claude Code configuration and check whether we are up to date. Describe the workflow.
evals.expected_output: The response audits current config, researches/latest-features when needed, compares against best practices, proposes scoped changes, and verifies generated config.
assertions: The output inventories current Claude Code configuration before proposing changes.
The output checks latest features or best practices rather than relying only on memory.
The output compares current setup against concrete opportunities or anti-patterns.
The output proposes scoped config changes instead of broad rewrites.
The output includes validation or verification after changes.

evals.name: avoid unrequested rewrite
evals.prompt: A user asks: are there any small improvements to my config? Describe how to avoid overreach.
evals.expected_output: The response limits scope to audit and small recommendations, asks before major changes, preserves working configuration, and separates must-fix from optional improvements.
assertions: The output limits itself to small improvements or an audit unless the user approves more.
The output preserves working configuration and avoids wholesale rewrites.
The output separates must-fix issues from optional suggestions.
The output asks for confirmation before making major or risky config changes.
The output includes a way to verify config changes if applied.
